source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Containers A and B in figure hold the same gas. The volume of B is four times the volume of A. The two containers are connected by a thin tube (negligible volume) and a valve that is closed. The gas in A is at pressure of 1.0 \times 10^5\ \text{Pa}. The gas in B is at pressure of 5.0 \times 10^5\ \text{Pa}. Heaters will maintain the temperatures of A and B even after the valve is opened. After the valve is opened, gas will flow one way or the other until A and B have equal pressure. What is this final pressure?
